description: These Sneakerina range of ballerina flats from puma are the perfect mixture of sneaker comfort and airy feel of ballerina shoes. Team this up with jeans and tees or with denim mini skirts and simple white vests for a cool casual look.Uppers Mesh upper with synthetic overlays for long wear and breathability Appliqued formstripe on the side Embroidered cat logo on the heel counter Elastic strap with heat transfer cat logo for easy insertion and removal of the feet and for snug Fit Lightly padded collar for greater comfort Moisture-wicking lining Midsole Antimicrobial EcoOrthoLite footbed for odor prevention and long-term cushioning Outsole Rubber outsole with circular lugs on the forefoot for superior traction Circular lugs on the heel counter to give greater protection to the heel
